questions.question: breakfast 的意思是“晚餐”。
questions.explanation: breakfast 意为“早餐”，dinner 才是“晚餐”。

questions.question: 当你想问别人“几点了？”可以说：What time is it?
questions.explanation: 这是询问时间的标准句型。

questions.question: go to school 的意思是“去上学”。
questions.explanation: go to school 是常用固定搭配。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's time for breakfast. 里的 breakfast 是动词短语。
questions.explanation: breakfast 是名词，所以前面用 for。

questions.question: o'clock 必须用在点钟（整点）之后。
questions.explanation: o'clock 意为“……点钟”，常接在整点数字后。

questions.question: It's seven ____.
questions.explanation: 整点表达常用 o'clock。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's 9:00 p.m. It's time ____ go to bed.
questions.explanation: go 是动词，It's time to 后接动词原形。

questions.question: I have ____ at 7:00 a.m.
questions.explanation: 早上七点通常是吃早餐的时间。

questions.question: —What time is it? —____
questions.explanation: 回答时间提问应回复具体数字或时间。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's time ____ PE class.
questions.explanation: PE class 是名词短语，需用 It's time for。

questions.question: Time ____ go to school.
questions.explanation: Time to + 动词，省去了 It's。

questions.question: Let's drink some milk. It's time for ____.
questions.explanation: 喝牛奶通常发生在早餐或晚餐，选项中 breakfast 最合适。

questions.question: School is over. Let's ____.
questions.explanation: 放学了（School is over）应该回家。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: Wait! It's time ____ dinner. Just a minute.
questions.explanation: dinner 是名词，表示该吃晚饭了。

questions.question: I __ up at 6:30.
questions.explanation: get up 是固定搭配，意为“起床”。

questions.question: What ___ is it? It's 10:00.
questions.explanation: 提问时间固定词组为 what time。

questions.question: It's 12:00. It's time for ___.
questions.explanation: 中午 12 点通常是午餐时间。

questions.question: It's 8:00. Let's go to ___.
questions.explanation: 八点钟通常是上学的时间。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's time ___ sing and dance.
questions.explanation: sing 是动词，前接 to。

questions.question: 请将英语短语与对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: lunch-午餐；English class-英语课；music class-音乐课；dinner-晚餐。

questions.question: 请将英语短语与对应的中文意思连线。
questions.explanation: 注意选项中有 go home/school 的混淆，但此题主要测试起床、回家睡觉和结束的动作。

questions.question: 连词成句：is,What,time,it,?
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问句，What 置于句首。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: 连词成句：time,school,It's,for,.
questions.explanation: 陈述句，It's time for... 后接名词短语。

questions.question: “6点整”可以表达为 six o'clock。
questions.explanation: 整点用法正确。

questions.question: get up 的意思是“去上学”。
questions.explanation: get up 是“起床”。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's time for music class. (这里可以说 It's time to music class)
questions.explanation: music class 是名词，不能用 to。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: Time to go home. 这是 It's time to go home. 的简写形式。
questions.explanation: 口语中常省略 IT is。

questions.question: English class 之后要加 s 变成复数才正确。
questions.explanation: 泛指一节英语课时用单数。

questions.question: —____ is it? —It's 10:00.
questions.explanation: 根据答句可知是问时间。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's 4:00. It's time to ____.
questions.explanation: to 后面接动词短语 go home。

questions.question: It's 7:00. It's time for ____.
questions.explanation: for 后面接名词 English。

questions.question: —What time is it now? —It's nine ____.
questions.explanation: 表示整点点钟。

questions.question: School is over. Let's go to the ____.
questions.explanation: 放学后通常可以去操场玩耍。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's time ____ breakfast.
questions.explanation: breakfast 是名词。

questions.question: Let's ____! It's 6:30. Time for school.
questions.explanation: hurry up 意为“快点”，符合语境。

questions.question: —Is it 5:00 now? —____
questions.explanation: Is it 开头的一般疑问句，肯定回答用 Yes, it is.

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's 7 p.m. It's time ____ dinner.
questions.explanation: It's time to have dinner 相当于 It's time for dinner。

questions.question: I ____ at 9:00 p.m.
questions.explanation: 晚上九点是睡觉时间。

questions.question: I go to bed at 9:00 in the ___.
questions.explanation: 晚上睡觉，in the evening。

questions.question: ___ time is it? It's nine.
questions.explanation: 特殊疑问词开头小写（按题目规范）。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: It's 8:00. It's time ___ go to school.
questions.explanation: go 是动词，用 to。

questions.question: I have ___ at 12:00.
questions.explanation: 12点吃午饭。

questions.question: 把动作与中文意思匹配。
questions.explanation: A-起床；B-上学；C-回家；D-睡觉。

questions.question: 匹配关联词。
questions.explanation: 词义联想：早餐-面包；英语-书本；音乐-钢琴；体育-操场。

questions.knowledge_point: It's time for与It's time to句型区分
questions.question: 连词成句：time,school,It,is,for,.
questions.explanation: It is time for + 名词。

questions.question: 连词成句：o'clock,is,It,eight,.
questions.explanation: It is + 数字 + o'clock.

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 熟练掌握询问时间的句型 What time is it? 和回答句型 It's ... o'clock.
knowledge_summary.key_formula: What time is it? + It's [number] o'clock.
common_mistakes: 将 time 拼写成 team
knowledge_summary.tips: o'clock 只用于整点点钟，a.m. 表示上午，p.m. 表示下午。

knowledge_summary.point: It's time for 与 It's time to
knowledge_summary.core_concept: 区分固定句型中 for 与 to 后接成分的词性。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: It's time for + 名词/名词短语; It's time to + 动词/动词短语
common_mistakes: It's time for go to school (错误)
knowledge_summary.tips: 看空后面第一个单词，动作（动词）选 to，食物或课程（名词）选 for。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 掌握描述一天生活的核心动词短语。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: get up, go to school, have breakfast/lunch/dinner, go home, go to bed
common_mistakes: go to home (home是副词，前面不加to)
have a breakfast (餐名前通常不加冠词)
knowledge_summary.tips: 记住 'go home' 特例，其他上课上学睡觉都要加 to。
